name: Osman I
role: Founder of the Ottoman Dynasty (r. c.1299–1323/4)
quote: I am the son of a great ghazi and I shall be a ghazi like my father.

name: Mehmed II (the Conqueror)
role: Ottoman Sultan — Conquered Constantinople (r. 1444–46, 1451–81)
quote: Either the city will be taken or I will take Constantinople, or I will find my death there.

name: Suleiman I (the Magnificent)
role: Ottoman Sultan at Empire's Peak (r. 1520–1566)
quote: I am the Sultan of Sultans, the sovereign of sovereigns, the dispenser of crowns to the monarchs on the face of the earth.

name: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk
role: Founder of the Turkish Republic; President 1923–1938
quote: Peace at home, peace in the world. (Yurtta sulh, cihanda sulh.)

name: İsmet İnönü
role: 2nd President of Turkey (1938–1950); CHP leader; negotiated Treaty of Lausanne
quote: Democracy is not just a form of government but a way of life.

name: Adnan Menderes
role: Prime Minister (1950–1960); executed after 1960 coup; Democrat Party
quote: If the nation wills it, even the sharia can be reinstated.

name: Gen. Kenan Evren
role: Led 1980 Military Coup; 7th President of Turkey (1982–1989)
quote: We have taken over administration to save the country and to hand it back to the civilians in the shortest possible time.

name: Turgut Özal
role: Prime Minister (1983–89); 8th President (1989–93); economic liberalization architect
quote: We must integrate Turkey into the world economy and end the era of state control.

name: Necmettin Erbakan
role: Islamist PM removed by '97 'Postmodern Coup'; Refah/Fazilet party founder; Erdoğan's mentor
quote: Turkey will lead the Islamic world. Istanbul will be the center of an Islamic common market.

name: Abdullah Öcalan
role: PKK founder and ideological leader; imprisoned on İmralı Island since 1999
quote: We do not fight for an independent Kurdistan; we fight for the freedom of the Kurdish people within a democratic Turkey.

name: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
role: Prime Minister (2003–14); President (2014–present); AKP co-founder
quote: Democracy is like a tram. You ride it until you arrive at your destination, then you step off.

name: Abdullah Gül
role: 11th President of Turkey (2007–2014); AKP co-founder with Erdoğan
quote: Turkey's integration with Europe is irreversible; it is Turkey's civilizational choice.

name: Fethullah Gülen
role: Islamic cleric; head of Gülenist movement (FETÖ); Erdoğan ally turned adversary; based in Pennsylvania until death 2024
quote: Service to humanity is service to God.

name: Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu
role: CHP leader (2010–2023); lost 2023 presidential election to Erdoğan; called 'Turkish Gandhi'
quote: We will build a fair, democratic, pluralist Turkey — not one man's Turkey.

name: Selahattin Demirtaş
role: HDP co-chair (2014–2018); presidential candidate; imprisoned since November 2016 — ECtHR orders release ignored
quote: We will not make you president. (to Erdoğan, in the 2014 presidential campaign)

name: Ekrem İmamoğlu
role: Istanbul Mayor (2019–2025); CHP; Erdoğan's main rival; detained March 2025
quote: Istanbul belongs to everyone. The government that divides will lose.

name: Devlet Bahçeli
role: MHP leader (1997–present); Erdoğan coalition partner; architect of 'People's Alliance'
quote: The Turkish nation will not kneel before any threat.

name: Ahmet Davutoğlu
role: PM (2014–2016); 'Strategic Depth' foreign policy architect; AKP founder turned opposition (Gelecek Party)
quote: Turkey is the natural center of gravity of the Middle East, Balkans, and Caucasus.

name: Mansur Yavaş
role: Ankara Mayor (2019–present); CHP; ranked among Turkey's most popular politicians; potential 2028 presidential candidate
quote: We govern for all Ankara residents, not for a political party.

name: Bülent Ecevit
role: PM multiple times (1970s–1999–2002); ordered Cyprus intervention 1974; social-democratic CHP faction leader
quote: The Cyprus operation was not a war but a peace mission.

name: Abdülhamid II
role: 34th Ottoman Sultan (r. 1876–1909); suspended constitution, ruled autocratically; deposed by Young Turks in 1909
quote: I have no intention of abdicating. Fate has willed that I should govern this empire, and govern it I will.

name: Enver Pasha (İsmail Enver)
role: Ottoman War Minister 1914–1918; CUP triumvirate leader; architect of WWI alliance with Germany; died fighting Red Army in Central Asia 1922
quote: We shall reverse the defeats of the past century and build a great Turkic empire from Istanbul to Samarkand.

name: Meral Akşener
role: İYİ (Good) Party founder and leader (2017–present); former MHP; led opposition Table of Six coalition in 2023 elections
quote: Turkey needs a strong leader who can say 'no' to Erdoğan's one-man rule and restore parliamentary democracy.

name: Hakan Fidan
role: Turkish Foreign Minister (2023–present); former MIT intelligence chief (2010–2023); key Erdoğan ally and back-channel diplomat
quote: Turkish foreign policy serves Turkey's strategic interests and those of regional stability — not any external power's agenda.

name: Ali Babacan
role: AKP co-founder; Economy and Finance Minister (2002–2015); DEVA Party founder (2020); pro-reform liberal opposition
quote: Turkey deserves a rule-of-law democracy with an independent central bank, a free press, and an independent judiciary.
